title: Simply Infinite
description: Simply Infinite is an optimization modpack for 20w14infinite, the April Fools snapshot for the never-released Ultimate Content Update.
body:
Simply Infinite is an optimization modpack for 20w14infinite, the April Fools snapshot for the never-released [Ultimate Content Update](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/every-update-imaginable-coming-minecraft). **Compatibility Note:** Simply Infinite recommends use of Java 17. While the pack _should_ work on Java 8, issues may occur. ## What is 20w14infinite? 20w14infinite is one of the yearly April Fools updates for Minecraft, where tossing a written book into a Nether Portal creates one of 2,147,483,645 procedurally generated dimensions, based off the contents of the book. Exploring these random dimensions allows players to gain resources as normal, allowing for all sorts of builds with block palettes that are otherwise hard to get in a default Vanilla game.

How To Play

- After downloading the pack, get started as normal. Once you have a base set up and enough supplies for a Nether Portal, write a book, and throw it into the Portal - signed or unsigned, doesn't matter. Going into this portal will create a new dimension based off the seed written in the book. - Something to try: There's 43 hard coded [Easter Egg dimensions](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_20w14%E2%88%9E#World_generation). Try using the names of these dimensions as your dimensional seed, a great one to get started with is the 'library' dimension. ## More Challenges ![A screenshot from a randomly generated dimension in Infinity Plus.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GPvoxgcE/images/64f85fcba434513be1fc74a9ccd25d9ccf0a7ee4.png) If you enjoy Simply Infinite, you might like some similar projects! - [Infinity Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/infinity-plus) is a modpack I designed that's inspired by 20w14infinite. It uses the [Infinite Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-dimensions) mod to bringing randomly generated dimensions into 1.20! - [20w14~ Improvements](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/20w14-improvements/) is a datapack that can be used with this modpack and spawns you directly into the Library and prevents you from exploring the Overworld or Nether. It's a great way to force yourself to explore the custom dimensions, though I haven't had a chance to play with it myself. ## Mod List + Mod Licenses Every mod in this pack has been handpicked to be compatible with 20w14infinite, including some custom ports. If you know/have made any mods that would fit in the pack, send them my way! Looking to develop mods for 20w14infinite? Start with the [Infinite Example Mod](https://github.com/cassiancc/infinite-example-mod)!
1.15 Dragon Hitbox Fix 1.15 Dragon Hitbox Fix is available on Modrinth!
Alternate CurrentThis pack makes use of a custom backport of SpaceWalkerRS's Alternate Current. This mod is available under the MIT License from GitHub.
AppleSkinThis pack makes use of a custom backport of squeek502's AppleSkin. This mod is available under the Unlicense from GitHub.
Clickthrough+This pack makes use of a custom backport of Giselaber's Clickthrough. This backport is available on Modrinth in accordance with its Unlicense.
Fabric LoaderThis pack uses Fabric Loader 0.14.23.
Fabric APIFabric API for 20w14infinite is available on Modrinth!
Fabric Language KotlinFabric Language Kotlin for 20w14infinite is available on Modrinth!
FabricToolsThis pack makes use of a custom backport of Giselaber's Clickthrough. This mod is available under the CC-0 License from GitHub.

malilibThis pack makes use of a custom backport of maruohon's malilib. This mod is available under the GPL from GitHub.
Mod MenuMod Menu by Terraformers has an official build for 20w13b-20w15a, but the only download link is on CurseForge. Its included here as authorized by its MIT License.
Music Duration ReducerMod Menu by LuduCrypt has an official build for 1.16-Snapshot, but the only download link is on CurseForge. Its included here as authorized by its LGPL License.
Mouse WheelieMouse Wheelie by Siphalor has an official build for 20w12a, but the only download link is on CurseForge . Its included here as authorized by its Apache License 2.0.
Roughly Enough ItemsRoughly Enough Items by shedaniel has an official build for 20w14infinite, but the only download link is on CurseForge. Its included here as authorized by its MIT License'.
Screenshot to ClipboardScreenshot to Clipboard is available on Modrinth!
Sheep ConsistencyThis pack makes use of a custom backport of Crupette's Sheep Consistency. This mod is available under the MIT License from GitHub.
Shulker Box TooltipShulker Box Tooltip by MisterPeModder has an official build for 20w14infinite, but the only download link is on CurseForge. Its included here as authorized by its MIT License'.
SodiumThis pack makes use of the excellent Sodium backport by MrMangoHands. This mod is available under the MIT License from GitHub.
StarlightThis pack makes use of a backport of PaperMC'sStarlightby KingContaria.This mod is available under the GPL License from GitHub.
Tick StasisTick Stasis is available on Modrinth!
Unity Unity by CyanideX is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License. It has been modified to include additional textures based off the existing textures were added for some of 20w14infinite's custom blocks.
Unity Dark EditionUnity Dark Edition by CyanideX is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License. It has been modified to remove the title screen Dark Edition branding.
VoxelMapVoxelMap by MamiyaOtaru has an official build for 20w13b, but the only download link is on CurseForge. Its included here as authorized by its distribution rules.'.
VoyagerThis pack includes Voyagerby modmuss50.This mod is available under the WTFPL License from GitHub.
WI ZoomWI Zoom is available on Modrinth!
